calendar.matters:
Petition Under California Probate Code Sec 17200 Concerning The Internal Affairs Of The Trust: 1)Remiving The Trustee; 2)Passing Upon The Acts Of The Trustee; 3) Nullifying The Notification By Trustee Pursuant To Probate Code §16061.7
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Martins appeared by telephone for Dennis O'Laughlin (Trustee).
Errol Zshornack for Cynthia Abilano (Beneficiary).

The Court noted that the Trustee filed a declaration that his petition go off calendar without prejudice to being filed elsewhere. Mr. Zshornack stated that if the Court is not inclined to grant venue, he requests that the petition he filed go off calendar. The Petition Concerning the Internal Affairs of the Trust, etc. and Petition to Determine that an Asset Belongs to the Trust of the Decedent, etc. are off calendar for lack of venue and without prejudice to being filed in an appropriate venue.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Determine That An Asset Belongs To The Trust Of The Decedent; For Removal Of Persons In Possession Of Real Property And For An Order Requiring Clerk Of The Court To Issue A Writ Of Possession (Probate Code 17200.1 And 850(A)(3)(B))
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine That An Asset Belongs To The Trust Of The Decedent; For Removal Of Persons In Possession Of Real Property And For An Order Requiring Clerk Of The Court To Issue A Writ Of Possession (Probate Code 17200.1 And 850(A)(3)(B))
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Continued To Jan-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Under California Probate Code Sec 17200 Concerning The Internal Affairs Of The Trust: 1)Remiving The Trustee; 2)Passing Upon The Acts Of The Trustee; 3) Nullifying The Notification By Trustee Pursuant To Probate Code §16061.7
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Continued To Jan-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Errol Zshornack for Cynthia Abillano (Beneficiary).
Edward Martins appeared by telephone for Dennis O'Laughlin (Trustee).

The Court raised the issue of venue, stated that the Trustee is not administering the Trust in San Francisco, that it is not waiving venue, that the property being located in San Francisco is not a basis for venue, that the original Trustee is no longer administering the Trust and spoke of the Legislature rules regarding venue. Mr. Martins raised the issue of transferring the matter to Alameda County. The Court noted that Mr. Martins' Client is not in Alameda County. Mr. Martins stated that his Client recently moved from Alameda County and raised the issue of changing the address of administering the Trust to his office address in Hayward. The Court made it clear that it will not be a party to Counsel drafting that declaration. Mr. Zshornack presented oral argument to support venue remaining in San Francisco. The Petition Concerning the Internal Affairs of the Trust, etc. is continued to January 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
